Compliance.description: No regulatory complaints or issues found. Pty Ltd registered, providers certified/insured per site, background/criminal checks, no FSCA/CMS etc. mentions needed for category.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Limited public reviews; positive company-reported 4.7 stars average, 95% satisfaction, Apple Partner app 4.5/5 (few reviews), mixed customer app reviews including one scam allegation.

Product Value.description: Convenient vetted services with transparent pricing, broad range beyond cleaning, good reported value but limited independent verification.

Innovation.description: Mobile app with booking, matching, ratings/reviews, facial recognition safety, fintech payments, provider training programs, township formalization.

Customer Support.description: Customer support mentioned for issues/refunds/cancellations, email prakhar@goodapp.co.za, phone +27 62 960 4406, responsive per interviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: Vetted providers with background checks, facial recognition verification, payment protection, data encrypted in transit, POPIA not explicitly mentioned but privacy policy present. Good digital access via app/web.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Upfront fixed pricing estimates during booking (specific ZAR not publicly listed)

socialSentiment.summary: Limited; mostly promotional positive posts on LinkedIn/FB/Instagram, company claims high satisfaction, no major negative trends on HelloPeter or social.
